definition: fully qualified domain name of the manufacturer of a product using a universal resource identifier (URI)

definition_ml.en: fully qualified domain name of the manufacturer of a product using a universal resource identifier (URI)
definition_ml.de: qualifizierter Domain-Name des Herstellers eines Produkts durch die Verwendung eines Universal Resource Identifiers (URI)

note: The URI comprises the URL and the URN.

note_ml.en: The URI comprises the URL and the URN.
note_ml.de: Der URI umfasst den URL und den URN.

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM); legacy property, updated by 0112/2///61360_7#CBA032 - URI of manufacturer
